overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student walking through a stone corridor into a large magical greenhouse, then entering a Herbology classroom. The clip transitions from movement through atmospheric environments to a static observation of the classroom setting at 4:30pm.

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs through a narrow corridor with metal gates

notable_agents.action: another student in dark robes walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: ornate green metal door with circular window at top of stairs
weathered stone steps with moss and cracks
rough gray stone wall with green patina
black wrought iron railing with decorative spikes

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a Slytherin student ascending a narrow stone stairwell with wrought iron railings and weathered stone walls. The environment is enclosed and dimly lit, with an ornate metal gate visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: large greenhouse conservatory with central tree

events.description: exits stone corridor into large glass greenhouse with massive twisted tree

agents.ego_description: walking along stone pathway through the greenhouse, passing the large central tree

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking ahead toward the classroom entrance

entered.detail: tall arched glass and metal greenhouse framework with green patinated supports
massive gnarled tree with thick roots surrounded by rocks
irregular stone paving tiles winding through the greenhouse
green painted iron support beams with decorative scrollwork
tree branches with pink cherry-like blossoms hanging overhead

segments.scene_description: The student emerges from the stone corridor into a vast greenhouse conservatory filled with natural light. A massive twisted tree dominates the center, surrounded by stone pathways and metal framework. Pink blossoms hang from overhead branches as the character walks toward a distant arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: greenhouse classroom entrance with potted plants

events.description: enters the herbology classroom through arched doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through arched doorway into the classroom area with work tables

entered.detail: green metal and stone archway leading into classroom
dense green vines draping from ceiling and walls
various magical plants in large containers
long wooden work tables with stools arranged in rows

segments.scene_description: The student approaches and enters an arched doorway into the Herbology classroom. The space becomes denser with hanging vines and potted plants. Wooden work tables become visible in the interior space as the character moves through the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: herbology classroom with work tables and magical flora

events.description: camera stops moving and settles into stationary observation of classroom

agents.ego_description: standing still observing the classroom environment and other students

notable_agents.action: professor in gray robes walking along the left side of the classroom

entered.detail: large magical plant with red spiky flowers in stone planter
wooden stools arranged at the work tables
arched glass ceiling panels with metal framework

segments.scene_description: The camera comes to rest in the Herbology classroom, showing rows of wooden work tables with stools and large potted magical plants. Students are seated at tables while a professor walks along the left side. The space is filled with hanging vines and warm natural light filtering through the glass roof. The on-screen text indicates it is 4:30pm Herbology class.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed stone stairwell into a bright, plant-filled Herbology classroom. It begins with a Slytherin student ascending a narrow stone staircase with wrought iron railings, moving toward an ornate metal gate. As the student emerges from the corridor, the environment opens into a vast, sunlit greenhouse conservatory dominated by a massive twisted tree and hanging pink blossoms. The camera then follows the character through an arched doorway, where the open conservatory shifts into the denser interior of a classroom filled with hanging vines and wooden work tables. Finally, the movement comes to a rest, revealing a scene of students seated at tables and a professor walking through the warm, natural light of the 4:30pm Herbology class.
